title: sanguisorba sanguisorba var. virescens
intro: Sanguisorba sanguisorba var. virescens, also known as the green bloody knapweed or green sanguisorba, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The medicinal properties of Sanguisorba sanguisorba var. virescens are said to provide various health benefits, including the treatment of hemorrhages, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as the relief of menstrual cramps and diarrhea. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams to aid in wound healing and skin care.
